prose: The frontier-orbitals task on water was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation converged with 7 SCF cycles, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 8.94067 eV.
